name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, soften gelatin in evaporated milk.
2. In a medium bowl, beat eggs and lowfat milk until frothy.
3. Add the egg mixture to the double boiler. Heat over hot water, stirring constantly, until the mixture coats a metal spoon.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in Sweet n Low and vanilla. Toss bananas with lemon juice.
5. Arrange the bananas on the bottom of the prepared crust.
6. Pour the filling over the bananas.
7. Refrigerate for several hours. Note: Nutritional information includes the crust, so do not add the calories and fat from that recipe to this one. 1/8 Pie + 132 calories, 3g fat = 20%
